stories.headline: Gaza-bound aid flotilla says it is 'under attack' as Israel intercepts fleet off Cyprus
stories.summary: The Israeli foreign ministry said the aim of the flotilla was to "serve Hamas, to divert attention from Hamas's refusal to disarm and to obstruct progress on President Trump's peace plan."

stories.headline: UAE still investigating mystery nuclear plant drone attack
stories.summary: The enigma surrounding Sunday’s unprecedented drone attack on the Barakah nuclear plant deepened on Monday as the UAE said the drone came from its western border, but it did not accuse Iran.

stories.headline: Israeli settlers run over livestock in occupied West Bank
stories.summary: Israeli settlers drove into a herd of livestock belonging to a Palestinian shepherd in the occupied West Bank.

stories.headline: Israeli forces board Gaza-bound flotilla near Cyprus, activists say
stories.summary: Live broadcasts from the Global Sumud flotilla show commandos boarding several boats trying to breach the Gaza maritime blockade.

stories.headline: Tankers Entering Hormuz During Iran War Are Making Their Way Out
stories.summary: Almost all large non-Iranian tankers that have entered the Persian Gulf during the war appear to have successfully exited with a cargo, underscoring the emergence of a small group of shipowners willing to risk crossing the Strait of Hormuz.

stories.headline: Magyar signals first openness to Ukraine accession talks since Orbán’s departure
stories.summary: Hungary's new government says it is open to engaging with Ukraine on its accession to the EU, according to several sources. Meanwhile, a technical dialogue with Kyiv has been announced on the thorny issue of Hungarian minorities. Brussels looks for a breakthrough.

stories.headline: Infectious diseases such as hantavirus and Ebola becoming more frequent and damaging, say experts
stories.summary: Pandemic report warns of growing global threat as health teams in Africa move to contain Ebola outbreak The world is becoming less resilient to outbreaks of infectious diseases, experts have warned, as health authorities in the Democratic Republic of the Congo and Uganda scramble to contain an outbreak of Ebola.The Global Preparedness Monitoring Board (GPMB) said in a report published on Monday that “as infectious disease outbreaks become more fr

stories.headline: Cuba warns US of ‘bloodbath’ if military action follows drone claims
stories.summary: Cuba’s president, Miguel Díaz-Canel, says any US strike would be catastrophic after reports of 300+ dronesCuba’s president, Miguel Díaz-Canel, has warned that any US military action against his country would lead to a “bloodbath” with incalculable consequences for regional peace and stability.“Cuba does not represent a threat,” Díaz-Canel said in a post on X. Continue reading...

stories.headline: What is the UAE’s Barakah nuclear plant, nearly hit by a drone?
stories.summary: The nuclear facility in Abu Dhabi has the capacity to meet one-quarter of the UAE's electricity needs.

stories.headline: Iran sends response to US proposal to end war via mediator Pakistan
stories.summary: Iran demands the release of assets frozen abroad, the lifting of sanctions and control over the Strait of Hormuz.

stories.headline: Iran says nuclear enrichment rights cannot be ‘negotiated’
stories.summary: Iran’s nuclear enrichment is a right that ‘already exists’, foreign ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei said.

stories.headline: Ryanair profits surge 40% to €2.26 billion despite Boeing delays and fuel crisis
stories.summary: Europe’s largest low-cost airline posted record annual profits as rising fares and sustained travel demand helped offset aircraft delivery delays and mounting uncertainty in global fuel markets due to the Iran war.

stories.headline: 'Everest Man' and 'Mountain Queen' break own records scaling world's tallest peak
stories.summary: Kami Rita Sherpa and Lakpa Sherpa summited Everest for the 32nd and 11th time, respectively.

stories.headline: Trump’s Approval Sinks Amid Unpopular War, Darkening G.O.P. Prospects
stories.summary: With the midterms nearing, President Trump’s approval rating has hit a second-term low as voters question his handling of the economy, according to the latest New York Times/Siena poll.

stories.headline: Indictment and Impeachment Only Made Him Stronger. Remind You of Anyone?
stories.summary: The fate of Ken Paxton, the conservative Texas firebrand, could decide whether Republicans keep control of the Senate.

stories.headline: Iran eyes challenging stock market reopening after lengthy war closure
stories.summary: The capital market is not Iranian economy's main financing engine, but it still matters politically and psychologically.

stories.summary: A regional vote in Andalusia points to a rightward shift in Spanish politics, despite Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez’s international push to position the country at the centre of progressive politics.

stories.headline: Former Google executive Matt Brittin takes reins at scandal-hit public broadcaster BBC
stories.summary: Brittin replaces Tim Davie, who had held the BBC post since 2020. He resigned in November over a lawsuit brought by US President Donald Trump.

stories.headline: NextEra to Buy Dominion for $67 Billion to Create US Power Giant
stories.summary: NextEra Energy Inc. agreed to pay about $67 billion in stock for Dominion Energy Inc. in the biggest power acquisition ever, creating a giant utility extending from Florida to the artificial intelligence data centers clustered in Virginia.

stories.headline: Companies Look to Once-Dead Caracas Stock Market as Volumes Soar
stories.summary: A raft of Venezuelan companies are looking to sell shares on the local stock exchange as the market wakes up after more than a decade of near paralysis under the socialist rule of former president Nicolas Maduro.

stories.headline: MIAX Bets Big on Retail Futures
stories.summary: MIAX CEO Thomas Gallagher joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why the exchange is betting big on retail futures trading, how mega IPOs like SpaceX could reshape options markets, and why Miami is emerging as “Wall Street South.” The conversation also covers Bloomberg’s new equity index futures launch and the next phase of MIAX’s expansion strategy. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Zambia Forms Gold Venture to Formalize Mining, Build Processing
stories.summary: Zambia’s state-controlled mining investment firm has formed a joint venture to formalize the artisanal gold trade in a region of the southern African country.

stories.headline: Ryanair Gains on Narrower Net Loss; Regeneron Melanoma Trial Failure | Stock Movers
stories.summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with Alexis Christoforous:

- NextEra Energy (NEE) agreed to pay about $67 billion in stock for Dominion Energy (D) in the biggest power acquisition ever, creating a giant utility extending from Florida to the data centers clustered in Virginia. The deal would give NextEra a swathe of electricity assets stretching across Virginia and the Carolinas.

stories.headline: Adani Enterprises Reaches $275 Million Settlement With Treasury
stories.summary: Adani Enterprises Ltd. agreed to pay $275 million over a probe by the Office of Foreign Assets Control, putting the Indian conglomerate a step closer to resolving its legal troubles in the US.

stories.headline: Ramaco’s Rare Earth Gamble
stories.summary: Ramaco CEO Randall Atkins joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why China’s steel dumping has hurt coal markets, why the company is betting big on rare earth minerals, and why processing, and not necessarily mining, is the toughest hurdle in building a US rare earth supply chain that's independent of China. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Eager for Arms Deal, Taiwan Stresses Need for U.S. Support
stories.summary: After President Trump hinted that weapons sales to Taiwan could figure in negotiations with China, officials emphasized their island’s strategic importance.

stories.headline: UzNIF debuts on London market in first international Uzbek IPO
stories.summary: The IPO generated more than $2.8 billion (€2.6bn) in investor demand and raised around $603 million (€540m). Officials at the London Stock Exchange described the listing as a landmark moment for Uzbekistan’s access to international capital markets.

stories.summary: The country is investigating the source of the strike, which it calls a "dangerous escalation".

stories.headline: GOP senator who voted to convict Trump in impeachment trial loses primary
stories.summary: Sen. Bill Cassidy of Louisiana failed to make the runoff in his GOP Senate primary five years after his vote to convict Donald Trump, which led the president to call for his ouster.

stories.headline: Inside the 'kill-zone' on Ukraine's front line, where new weapons have transformed war

stories.headline: Stocks Fall, Oil Rises on Doubts Over US-Iran Deal: Markets Wrap

stories.headline: Freight train and bus crash kills at least eight in Bangkok
stories.summary: Police and rescue officials said the collision sparked a fire that engulfed the bus.

stories.headline: Rescue diver dies during search for bodies of Italians who drowned in Maldives caves
stories.summary: Staff Sgt Mohamed Mahdhee died while diving in the search-and-rescue operation, the Maldives government tells the BBC.

stories.headline: Prisoner swap goes ahead as Kyiv mourns 24 killed in Russian strike on flats
stories.summary: Among the victims in Kyiv was 12-year-old Lyubava Yakovleva, whose father was killed during the war.

stories.headline: Trump says 20-year nuclear programme suspension by Iran would be enough
stories.summary: The US president says Tehran has to show "real" commitment to removing nuclear fuel and stopping uranium enrichment.

stories.headline: Former China hawk elected Solomon Islands' leader
stories.summary: Vote comes a week after lawmakers ousted the nation's former pro-China prime minister.

stories.headline: Xi takes Trump on tour of Communist Party's seat of power in Beijing
stories.summary: Trump and Xi toured Zhongnanhai, the heavily guarded compound where China's top leaders live and work.

stories.headline: Hezbollah support endures in south Lebanon as ceasefire fails to stop war with Israel

stories.headline: Climbers clear path to Everest summit past giant chunk of ice

stories.headline: Pakistan struck a rehab centre and killed 269 Afghans. Their families want to know why

stories.headline: EU needs to delay social media access for children - von der Leyen
stories.summary: She told an EU summit that an expert panel was due to come up with steps on how to protect minors online by July.

stories.headline: Australia has some of the world's costliest homes. Will scrapping tax breaks help?
stories.summary: The government hopes reforms will help young people enter the market, while critics say it will stifle supply.

stories.headline: Trump ally Kari Lake tapped to be US ambassador to Jamaica
stories.summary: Lake thanked President Trump for nominating her, saying on social media that Jamaica "is a country I know very well, full of incredible people".

stories.headline: Advocaat, 78, set for World Cup record after Curacao return
stories.summary: Dick Advocaat makes a surprise return as Curacao's head coach after his successor Fred Rutten resigned just a month out from their World Cup debut.
